name: link2vs
description: Connect AI Agent to Visual Studio 2026/2022 via MCP Protocol (UniversalVSMCP). Native .NET runtime with MCP Registry integration for one-click installation in VS 2026.
author: StarsailsClover

mcp_config.description: Configuration for AI Agent to connect to VS via UniversalVSMCP. The .NET native version supports MCP Registry discovery in VS 2026.

dotnet_tool.description: Run as installed global .NET tool (recommended for production)

vs2026_registry_install.description: One-click installation via VS 2026 MCP Registry (requires server.json in repo root)
vs2026_registry_install.note: VS 2026 MCP Registry feature may require restart. If no response after adding registry URL, restart VS and check Tools > Options > Environment > Extensions > MCP Server List.
steps: 2. Go to Tools > Options > Environment > Extensions
3. In MCP Registry section, click Add
troubleshooting: If nothing happens after adding registry:
2. Check MCP Server List tab for 'universal-vsmcp'
3. If still not visible, use Method B (Manual MCP Server) instead
4. Ensure server.json is at repository root (not in subfolder)

vs2026_manual_config.gui_path: Tools > Options > Environment > Extensions > Check 'Edit user settings as JSON'

claude_desktop_config.description: Configuration for Claude Desktop / Cursor / Cline

registry_setup.description: How to register this MCP server for VS 2026 discovery
prerequisites: server.json must exist at repository root
steps: 1. Ensure server.json is at repository root
2. Create GitHub release: git tag -a v1.0.0 && git push origin v1.0.0
3. In VS 2026: Tools > Options > Environment > Extensions
6. Click Install to add to MCP Server List
registry_setup.note: The MCP Registry feature in VS 2026 may be in preview. If it doesn't work, use the manual configuration method.
